The trade's total value was approximately Rs. 23.91 crore.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals' P/E is at 59.8, above the industry's 55.4, reflecting strong valuation.
Despite short-term decline, Apollo Hospitals' long-term outlook remains robust as a Nifty 50 constituent.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals' P/E is at 59.8, above the industry's 55.4, reflecting strong valuation.
Despite short-term decline, Apollo Hospitals' long-term outlook remains robust as a Nifty 50 constituent.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's picks include ICICI Pru AMC, Apollo Hospitals, Bharat Dynamics, Siemens Energy, Jain Resource Recycling, and TBO Tek for growth potential.
Highlights include ICICI Pru AMC's 15% revenue CAGR, Apollo's 22% earnings CAGR, and Bharat Dynamics' strong order book and diversified portfolio.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's picks include ICICI Pru AMC, Apollo Hospitals, Bharat Dynamics, Siemens Energy, Jain Resource Recycling, and TBO Tek for growth potential.
Highlights include ICICI Pru AMC's 15% revenue CAGR, Apollo's 22% earnings CAGR, and Bharat Dynamics' strong order book and diversified portfolio.

news.title:
Citi adds Apollo Hospitals to its Pan-Asia Focus List with a 'Buy' rating, target price Rs 9,600.
Citi highlights Apollo's growth in pharmacy, digital profitability, and valuation comfort; flags key risks like high costs.
news.summary:
Citi adds Apollo Hospitals to its Pan-Asia Focus List with a 'Buy' rating, target price Rs 9,600.
Citi highlights Apollo's growth in pharmacy, digital profitability, and valuation comfort; flags key risks like high costs.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals raised stake in Apollo Health to 99.42% by acquiring 30.58% from IFC, IFC EAF.
The acquisition cost Rs. 12,540.7M, with CCI approval received for the transaction.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals raised stake in Apollo Health to 99.42% by acquiring 30.58% from IFC, IFC EAF.
The acquisition cost Rs. 12,540.7M, with CCI approval received for the transaction.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals' valuation shifted from attractive to fair by early 2026.
Despite this, the firm outperforms Sensex across multiple time horizons.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals shared the transcript of its Q3 FY26 results presentation.
The transcript is available on the company's website for public access.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals has released the audio recording of its analyst call on financial results for the three and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The recording is available on the company's website, adhering to SEBI regulations, for stakeholder access.

news.title:

Q2 insurance agreements positively impacted Q3 business volumes.
news.summary:

news.title: Apollo Hospitals surpasses Q3 estimates as specialty care boosts growth.
news.summary: Apollo Hospitals surpasses Q3 estimates as specialty care boosts growth.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals' consolidated revenue grew 14% YoY to ₹64,774M; EBITDA margin at 24.8%.
Healthcare services revenue rose 14% YoY with 67% occupancy; digital health GMV up 28%.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals' consolidated revenue grew 14% YoY to ₹64,774M; EBITDA margin at 24.8%.
Healthcare services revenue rose 14% YoY with 67% occupancy; digital health GMV up 28%.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals' subsidiary acquired 100% stake in Belenus Champion Hospitals Pvt Ltd.
This acquisition aims to expand and upgrade hospital operations in Bangalore.
news.summary:

news.title:

Q3 consolidated revenue stood at Rs.64,774 mn, EBITDA at Rs.20,442 mn.
